    Inspired by the Inquisition, modern medical and institutional devices, and the drawings of Gord and Pichard, PD "ingenious gizmologist" re-creates and explores the full range of terrifying instruments used to overwhelm female flesh

    Original medieval, fetish, gown and costume bondage, with beautiful damsels in distress, in photos, photostories and videos.

    Damsels In Distress, Bound and Gagged, Thousands of photos and videos

  • Sweet Ties

    Thousands of exclusive, original, hot bondage photos and videos. Tons of beautiful ladies bound and gagged

  • Ashley Renee

    Ashley is the ultimate bondage model tied up by the World's Best Bondage Riggers, often in latex in high resolution pictures and video!

  • Handcuff.com

    Pioneering many adult techniques featuring images of bondage, S&M B&D, power transfer, women in bondage, gags, chains, whips, enemas.

  • Hogtied

    The sensual world of BDSM. Pictures and video of tight, restrictive bondage. All original, imaginative content. Weekly updates.

  • Fucking Machines

    Beautiful women get screwed at speeds up to 350 RPM. You will never see another site like this one! Also features sybian sex.

  • Water Bondage

    Helpless bound beauties get sprayed, washed, dunked and boned, breath play, orgasms and underwater bondage leave the sexy subs wet and wanting more.

  • Wired Pussy

    Beautiful women are tied up, dominated, and fucked with all kinds of insane electrical toys and insertables.

  • Bondage Damsels

    Damsels In Distress, Bound and Gagged, Serving the bondage community for over 10 years! Thousands of photos and videos

  • Serious Bondage

    Huge site containing many, many bondage, encasement and other techniques, stories, articles, images and product reviews. Be prepared for a long stay in this well presented website.

  • The Bondage Channel

    Forced Orgasms. Photos, DVD, VHS and Streaming video of Erotic Torment

  • Shackled Maidens

    Classic High Resolution photography of Mathew Brown featuring shackled maidens in latex and custom made restraints.

  • Charlotte Fetish

    Charlotte tied up, strapped tight, covered in latex, locked in cages, encased & long term storage, cocooned plus much more.

Note

These stories concern people in bondage & bdsm scenes and are therefore adult in nature.

The stories on these pages are either a work of fiction or are based on events that may have happened to the author. These stories remain the copyright property of their respective authors.

The stories contained on this page have been sent to me by the author to be posted on this site and therefore licensed by the author.

The images and story related texts are presented here on this website as a fantasy only and should in no way be replicated by anyone.

Submit Stories

If you'd like to see your story on this site, then please send your story to me. I'd love to see your stories.

Check out my writers guide for further details.

Please email your stories to gromet@grometsplaza.net
